channel.title: The Mutapa Times
channel.description: Business and intelligence newspaper delivering curated Zimbabwean news from foreign press for the diaspora.

item.title: ‘Opaque tenders are draining Zimbabwe’
item.description: Hazel Marimbizain BULAWAYO THE widespread manipulation of public contracts through opaque bidding and weak oversight is stifling national development and draining the... To access this content, please purchase a subscription by clicking the button below and select a package of yo #Zimbabwe #Business #ZimbabweEconomy #ZimbabweNews
item.dc:creator: Dailynews

item.title: Guy Scott, Who Made History As Africa’s First White Head Of State In Decades, Dies At 82
item.description: Africa’s First White Head Of State In Decades Dies As Zambia Prepares State Funeral Guy Scott, the Zambian politician who made history as Africa’s first white head of state in more than two decades, has died aged 82. The former vice-president briefly served as Zambia’s acting president in 2014 following the death of President Michael [...] The post Guy Scott, Who Made History As Africa’s First White Head Of State In Decades, Dies At 82 appeared first on iHarare News. #Zimbabwe #ZimbabweNews
item.dc:creator: Iharare News

item.title: Zimbabwean migrants in Louis Trichardt fear losing access to health services
item.description: Health-e News Zimbabwean immigrants living in Louis Trichardt say they are being turned away from clinics or told their latest chronic medication collection will be their last, raising fears that anti-immigrant pressure is starting to affect access to healthcare. The concern foll #Zimbabwe #Health #ZimbabweHealth #ZimbabweNews
item.dc:creator: The Zimbabwe News

item.title: Zimbabwe’s Constitution Amendment Act No. 3 needs safeguards to protect democracy, warns rights watchdog
item.description: THE Zimbabwe Peace Project (ZPP) has said the recently enacted Constitution of Zimbabwe Amendment (No. 3) Act could undermine political rights by weakening democratic participation, judicial independence and electoral oversight. In its June 2026 Monthly Monitoring Report, the human rights watchdog said the month was dominated by intense parliamentary debate over the controversial CAB3, describing [...] The post Zimbabwe’s Constitution Amendment Act No. 3 needs safeguards to protect democracy, warns rights watchdog appeared first on NewZimbabwe.com. (via The Zimbabwe News) #Zimbabwe #ZimbabweNews
item.dc:creator: The Zimbabwe News

item.title: Least paid mine worker to earn US$418 as new wage agreement takes effect

item.dc:creator: NewZimbabwe.com

item.title: Geo Pomona Chief Dilesh Nguwaya Lands Top Presidential Advisory Position
item.description: Dilesh Nguwaya Lands Powerful New Advisory Role As Mnangagwa Makes Fresh Appointment Geo Pomona Waste Management chief executive and executive chairman Dilesh Nguwaya has landed a powerful new advisory role after President Emmerson Mnangagwa appointed him as Special Advisor on Waste Management and Environmental Sustainability. The appointment, announced on 15 July 2026, takes immediate effect [...] The post Geo Pomona Chief Dilesh Nguwaya Lands Top Presidential Advisory Position appeared first on iHarare News. #Zimbabwe #ZimbabweNews
item.dc:creator: Iharare News

item.title: Zimbabwe must move beyond policy to bankable projects – ZIDA
item.description: The Zimbabwe Investment and Development Agency (ZIDA) has urged stakeholders to transform Zimbabwe’s devolution agenda into bankable investment projects that can attract local and foreign capital. Zimbabwe’s devolution policy is a constitutional and socio-economic strategy aimed at transferring powers, responsibilities and resources from the central government to provincial and local authorities to improve service delivery, [...] The post Zimbabwe must move beyond policy to bankable projects – ZIDA appeared first on NewZimbabwe.com. (via The Zimbabwe News) #Zimbabwe #ZimbabweNews
item.dc:creator: The Zimbabwe News

item.title: Zimbabwe completes requirements for duty-free access to Chinese market
item.description: Xinhua Zimbabwe has completed all requirements to enjoy duty-free access to the Chinese market for qualifying products, the national trade promotion organization ZimTrade has said. According to ZimTrade, Zimbabwean exporters can now obtain the required Certificate of Origin from #Zimbabwe #Business #ZimbabweEconomy #ZimbabweNews
item.dc:creator: The Zimbabwe News

item.title: Zimbabwe crush Bangladesh by 32 Runs to continue winning streak
item.description: Zimbabwe’s senior men’s cricket team made a winning start to the three-match T20 International series after defeating Bangladesh by 32 runs at Queens Sports Club on Wednesday. The victory gives the Chevrons a 1-0 lead in the series, with two matches still to be played. After losi #Zimbabwe #Business #ZimbabweEconomy #ZimbabweNews
item.dc:creator: The Zimbabwe News

item.title: Thousands Arrested Days After Police Launch Major National Operation @PoliceZimbabwe
item.description: Police Launch Nationwide Blitz On Serious Crime And Traffic Offences More than 2,000 people have been arrested just days after the Zimbabwe Republic Police (ZRP) launched a major nationwide operation targeting serious crime and traffic offences. Police say the operation, which began on 13 July 2026, is aimed at maintaining law and order, protecting lives [...] The post Thousands Arrested Days After Police Launch Major National Operation appeared first on iHarare News. #Zimbabwe #ZimbabweNews
item.dc:creator: Iharare News

item.title: Soldier arrested for allegedly stealing ZESA cables in Bindura @bulawayo24 @ZESAOfficial
item.description: A Zimbabwe National Army officer, Gift Nduna, and his alleged accomplice Philemon Sithole have been arrested after they reportedly stole ZESA cables at a farm in Bindura.The pair appeared before the B... (via Bulawayo24 News) #Zimbabwe #ZimbabweNews

item.title: WATCH: Sikandar Raza post-match – explaining the Fearless 8-batter strategy & World Cup “rude awakening”! @3menonaboat
item.description:
Zimbabwe T20I Captain and global franchise icon Sikandar Raza delivers a masterclass in high-performance sports psychology and modern cricket tactics in this post-match press conference following the Chevrons’ commanding 30-run victory over Bangladesh in the T20I opener.

The post WATCH: Sikandar Raza post-match – explaining the Fearless 8-batter strategy & World Cup “rude awakening”! first appeared on Three Men On a Boat.

(via Three Men On Boat) #Zimbabwe #ZimbabweNews
item.dc:creator: Three Men On Boat

item.title: Drama Before Derby: Highlanders Hit by Preparation Nightmare
item.description: Just three days out from one of Zimbabwean football’s biggest-ever fixtures, Highlanders have been thrown into turmoil by unrest within their own ranks. Highlanders were supposed to be locked in on their preparations for Sunday’s high-octane “Battle of Zimbabwe” derby against perennial rivals Dynamos. Instead, they find themselves dealing with a boycott of training by... The post Drama Before Derby: Highlanders Hit by Preparation Nightmare appeared first on Mbare Times. #Zimbabwe #ZimbabweNews
item.dc:creator: Mbare Times

item.title: Prison escapee alleges officer helped plan jailbreak @bulawayo24
item.description: A convicted rapist who escaped from Plumtree Prison while serving a 20-year sentence has told a Bulawayo court that a Zimbabwe Prisons and Correctional Services (ZPCS) officer masterminded and facilit... (via Bulawayo24 News) #Zimbabwe #ZimbabweNews
item.dc:creator: Bulawayo24 News

item.title: ZIFA suspends referees over officiating errors @bulawayo24
